name: Prism Break
short_description: Prism Break - a challenging and ever changing adventure through a colourful geometric world! Can you break out?
detailed_description:
Prism Break is a colourful and tough, sometimes rage inducing, platformer, inspired by the timeless super meat boy and celeste.

Prism Break starts out simple, classic and simple platforming, no tricks but soon you'll encounter new and unique challenges, requiring interesting solutions.

  • Story Mode, featuring more than 20 levels spanning 4 chapters!
  • Many unique mechanics including visits to different dimensions!
  • Timed levels, how fast can you break out?
  • A custom soundtrack and SFX!

In this challenging world of geometric colour and ever increasing challenge it takes a great player to break out of the prism, are you up to the task?
